title: 1'' x 15ft Quick Release Ratchet Tie Down Double Vinyl Coated Steel
description: The Ratchet Tie Down straps are used for various uses involving holding down equipment and cargo when it's been transported. They can be used for jobs like securing loads to vehicles or keeping construction materials in place. Faithfull ratchet straps are designed for ease of use and are fitted with integral 'S' style steel coated fixing hooks, which have a and quick release mechanism. They have an automatic locking ratcheting action and a cushioned thumb grip for user comfort.
